positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest at dusk. The main subject is a grouping of large, bioluminescent fantasy flora and fauna: massive, gentle-looking glowing butterflies with iridescent wings, stylized fox spirits perched on ancient, gnarled branches, and towering, crystalline mushroom clusters. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and detailed botanical illustration (e.g., reminiscent of vintage lithography meets modern kawaii aesthetics). Use a dramatic color palette of deep indigo, luminous cyan, warm magenta, and glowing emerald green. Composition must be centrally focused and suitable for repeating print patterns, utilizing strong silhouettes and defined edges. Dramatic rim lighting emphasizes the glowing elements and provides maximum contrast against the dark background. Clean line art, vector style, designed for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, messy, artifacts, low detail, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noisy, photorealism, grayscales, poor composition
